label: 14_afghan_afghanistan_taliban_afghans
description: The United States' withdrawal from Afghanistan after over a decade of conflict left the country's security forces and government vulnerable to Taliban resurgence. Analysts examined the challenges faced by Afghan institutions in maintaining stability post-2014.

earliest_articles.title: Negotiations and Reconciliation with the Taliban: Key Policy Issues and Dilemmas
